sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide earnings missed by $0.01, revenue fell short of estimates
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide (NYSE: OTIS) reported fourth-quarter EPS of $1.03, missing analyst estimates by $0.01, and revenue of $3.8 billion, falling short of the $3.89 billion consensus. The company provided a full-year 2026 revenue guidance between $15.00 billion and $15.30 billion. Otis Worldwide's stock has seen declines over the last three and twelve months, and its financial health is rated as "good performance" by InvestingPro.

feed.title: Federated Hermes Inc. Trims Stock Position in Southern Company (The) $SO
feed.summary: Federated Hermes Inc. reduced its stake in Southern Company (NYSE:SO) by 16.4% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 385,498 shares and ending with 1,958,098 shares valued at approximately $185.6 million. Despite beating Q3 EPS estimates, Southern missed revenue expectations, and analysts currently have a "Hold" rating on the stock with an average price target of $94.91, following mixed analyst activity including downgrades from Goldman Sachs and KeyCorp. The company's stock opened at $88.83, with a market capitalization of $97.81 billion, and various other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings.

feed.title: Danaher beats Q4 expectations as bioprocessing business shows strength
feed.summary: Danaher Corporation reported stronger-than-expected fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results, with adjusted EPS of $2.23 and revenue of $6.84 billion for Q4, driven by strong bioprocessing performance. Despite the positive report, shares saw a slight dip. The company projects low-single digit non-GAAP core revenue growth for Q1 2026 and expects full-year 2026 core revenue growth of 3% to 6%, with adjusted EPS between $8.35 and $8.50.

feed.title: Danaher Q4 Earnings Exceed Expectations
feed.summary: Danaher (DHR) reported Q4 non-GAAP EPS of $2.23, surpassing expectations by $0.04, and revenue of $6.84 billion, a 5.2% year-over-year increase. The company projects low single-digit core sales growth for 2026, with biotechnology contributing significantly, and adjusted diluted net earnings per share are expected to be between $8.35 and $8.50. Wall Street analysts maintain a positive outlook, with an average 1-year price target of $261.57.

feed.title: F5 Networks stock price target raised to $320 from $280 at Evercore ISI
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has raised its price target for F5 Networks (NASDAQ:FFIV) to $320 from $280, maintaining an "In Line" rating, after the company reported strong December quarter results. F5 Networks exceeded expectations with revenue of $822 million and EPS of $4.45, significantly driven by a 37% growth in its Systems (Hardware) segment and increased AI-related customer wins. The company also increased its fiscal year 2026 outlook for sales growth and EPS, despite anticipating a modest headwind to gross margins from rising memory costs in the second half.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial price target lowered to $88 by Evercore ISI
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has lowered its price target for Synchrony Financial (NYSE: SYF) to $88 from $97, while maintaining an Outperform rating. This adjustment reflects expectations of a higher expense run rate and increased retailer share arrangements as the company accelerates growth investments. Despite a recent 16% share decline due to concerns over a potential credit card rate cap, analysts remain bullish, with InvestingPro rating Synchrony's financial health as "GREAT."

feed.title: Fifth Third C-suite officer to retire; replacement named
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp, based in Downtown Cincinnati, has announced a change in its C-suite leadership. A C-suite officer overseeing a significant part of the bank's operations is set to retire, and a replacement has been named. Kristof Schneider will be stepping into the role of chief credit officer.

feed.title: After Earnings, Is Netflix Stock a Buy, a Sell, or Fairly Valued?
feed.summary: Morningstar analyst Matthew Dolgin, CFA, evaluates Netflix (NFLX) after its fourth-quarter earnings report, maintaining a 3-star "fairly valued" rating with a fair value estimate of $79 per share. The report notes strong revenue growth, particularly internationally, an expanding operating margin, and a solid free cash flow forecast for 2026. Despite a mature US market, Netflix's narrow economic moat and strong financial health position it well against competitors, although risks from increased competition and potential social issues remain.

feed.title: Going Into Earnings, Is Alphabet Stock a Buy, a Sell, or Fairly Valued?
feed.summary: Morningstar assesses Alphabet (GOOGL/GOOG) ahead of its Q4 2025 earnings report, focusing on Google Cloud growth, AI monetization, and potential capital expenditure increases. With a "Fairly Valued" 3-star rating and a $340 fair value estimate, Morningstar highlights Alphabet's wide economic moat, strong financial position, and medium uncertainty due to antitrust scrutiny and AI investment. The article covers both bull and bear arguments regarding its core advertising business, growth areas, and regulatory risks.

feed.title: Generac Announces Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
feed.summary: Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE: GNRC) announced it will release its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results before market open on Wednesday, February 11, 2026. A conference call with management will be held at 10:00 a.m. EST on the same day to discuss the results. The webcast details and replays will be available on Generac’s Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson MedTech hits $100M medtech product donation milestone
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson MedTech, supported by the Johnson & Johnson Foundation, has announced that it has donated $100 million in medtech products since 2020. The company plans to contribute an additional $20 million in 2026 to fund programs that empower health workers to deliver cardiac, vision, and surgical care. This initiative is part of the J&J CareCommunity platform, which aims to champion health workers and improve access to care globally.

feed.title: BD Board Authorizes 10 Million Additional Share Repurchases
feed.summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.05 per common share, payable on March 31, 2026. The company also announced it has repurchased $250 million in BD stock in fiscal 2026 and its board has authorized an additional repurchase of up to 10 million shares of BD common stock. This new authorization is in addition to shares remaining from previous authorizations in 2021 and 2025.

feed.title: LG Display turns to profit in 2025 on robust OLED performance
feed.summary: LG Display announced it returned to profit in 2025, marking its first profit in four years, primarily due to the strong performance of its organic light-emitting diode (OLED) business. The company reported an operating profit of 517 billion won ($360 million) for 2025, a significant turnaround from the previous year's loss, with its OLED division accounting for 61 percent of total sales. LG Display plans to continue focusing on its OLED sector and becoming a technology-oriented company for sustainable growth.

feed.title: Is Axalta Coating Systems (NYSE:AXTA) A Risky Investment?
feed.summary: The article analyzes Axalta Coating Systems' debt levels, concluding that while its EBIT conversion to free cash flow provides some comfort, the overall debt situation makes it a somewhat risky investment. As of September 2025, Axalta had US$3.40 billion in debt, with a net debt of US$2.80 billion after accounting for cash. The company's debt to EBITDA ratio is 2.8 and its EBIT covers interest expense 4.0 times, indicating manageability but caution against increasing debt.

feed.title: DSG Capital Advisors LLC Raises Holdings in Booking Holdings Inc. $BKNG
feed.summary: DSG Capital Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) by 216.9% during the third quarter, making it its 29th largest position. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings. The article also details recent analyst ratings, with Booking holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus, and recent insider selling activity, including sales by Director Vanessa Ames Wittman and CEO Glenn D. Fogel.

feed.title: Hussman Strategic Advisors Inc. Buys New Position in Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO

feed.title: DSG Capital Advisors LLC Has $7.27 Million Holdings in U.S. Bancorp $USB
feed.summary: DSG Capital Advisors LLC recently reduced its stake in U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) by 52.7% during the third quarter, holding 150,342 shares valued at $7.27 million. Despite this reduction, other institutional investors significantly increased their positions in U.S. Bancorp. The bank reported strong quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $58.19.

feed.title: Uber Technologies, Inc. $UBER Shares Purchased by EPG Wealth Management LLC
feed.summary: EPG Wealth Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) by 87.0% in the third quarter, now owning 33,186 shares valued at $3.25 million. This purchase makes Uber its 24th largest holding, amidst other institutional investors also acquiring new positions in the company. Despite some recent stock fluctuations and ongoing legal challenges for Uber, the company reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst estimates for both EPS and revenue due to a 20.4% year-over-year revenue increase.

feed.title: BlackRock fund steers to Turkish stocks with 10% exposure: Report | Daily Sabah
feed.summary: A report indicates that BlackRock, a U.S. investment giant, has significantly increased its exposure to Turkish stocks, with Türkiye now making up almost 10% of one of its top-performing funds. This pivot reflects a belief that the Turkish market is on the cusp of a turnaround due to slowing inflation and interest rate cuts, which have led to improved equity performance. Foreign investors, previously cautious, are showing renewed interest following a shift in economic policies and positive outlooks from credit ratings agencies like Fitch.

feed.title: EFG Asset Management North America Corp. Takes Position in Willdan Group, Inc. $WLDN
feed.summary: EFG Asset Management North America Corp. has acquired a new position of 24,812 shares in Willdan Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:WLDN), valued at approximately $2.396 million, representing 0.17% of the company. Willdan Group has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $124.33, and the stock is trading near its 52-week high, with significant institutional ownership at 72.29%. The company recently surpassed EPS estimates but fell short on revenue expectations in its last quarterly report.

feed.title: Lam Research stock price pops in premarket as LRCX heads into earnings
feed.summary: Lam Research (LRCX) stock price rose approximately 4.4% in premarket trading, reaching $249, as the company anticipates releasing its December-quarter earnings today after the U.S. market closes. Analysts forecast a 20% year-over-year revenue climb to $5.25 billion and adjusted earnings of $1.17 per share, with investors closely watching the company's outlook for the March quarter. This pre-earnings surge follows recent price target increases from Evercore ISI and Lynx Equity, highlighting increasing optimism for the chip-equipment maker.

feed.title: Core Alternative Capital Has $8.56 Million Stake in Walmart Inc. $WMT
feed.summary: Core Alternative Capital trimmed its stake in Walmart (WMT) by 11.9% in Q3, now holding 83,084 shares valued at $8.56 million, making it their sixth-largest position. Despite significant insider selling, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $123.20. Walmart recently exceeded EPS estimates and provided positive FY2026 guidance, driven by strong ad growth and AI adoption.

feed.title: Core Alternative Capital Sells 17,106 Shares of Blackstone Inc. $BX

Despite this, other institutional investors have been buying into Blackstone, and the company has also seen insider purchases from individuals like Ruth Porat and James Breyer. Analysts currently rate Blackstone as a "Hold" with a consensus target price of $177.25, though several brokerages recently lowered their price targets.

feed.title: Core Alternative Capital Sells 8,559 Shares of Newmont Corporation $NEM
feed.summary: Core Alternative Capital reduced its stake in Newmont Corporation (NEM) by 11.8% in Q3, selling 8,559 shares and now holding 63,837 shares valued at $5.38 million. Meanwhile, other institutional investors have mostly increased their positions in Newmont. The company is experiencing positive market sentiment due to rising gold prices and several analyst upgrades, though insider selling by the CEO and a director totaling over 9,000 shares has also been noted.

feed.title: Core Alternative Capital Has $5.33 Million Stock Holdings in Medtronic PLC $MDT
feed.summary: Core Alternative Capital significantly increased its stake in Medtronic PLC (NYSE:MDT) by 35.8% in Q3, now holding 55,911 shares valued at approximately $5.33 million. Medtronic recently reported strong Q3 earnings, exceeding consensus estimates for EPS and revenue, and provided optimistic FY2026 guidance. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with a target price of $110.28, and offers an annualized dividend of $2.84, yielding about 2.8%.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial (SYF) Q4 EPS Drop Tests Bullish Low P/E Valuation Narrative
feed.summary: Synchrony Financial (SYF) concluded FY 2025 with Q4 revenue of US$2,351 million and EPS of US$2.09, bringing its trailing twelve-month EPS to US$9.86 on US$9.76 billion in revenue. Despite a low trailing P/E of 7.4x and a stated DCF fair value significantly higher than its current share price, the company faces forecasts of declining earnings (3.9% per year) even with expected revenue growth. This divergence, coupled with a 2.1% bad loans ratio and flat profit margins, challenges the bullish sentiment rooted in its valuation gap.

feed.title: Core Alternative Capital Reduces Stock Position in PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP
feed.summary: Core Alternative Capital significantly reduced its stake in PepsiCo by 86.8% in Q3, selling over 20,000 shares. Despite this, PepsiCo offers a 3.8% dividend yield, though its payout ratio is high at 108.17%. Analysts generally rate PepsiCo as a "Hold" with an average price target of $159.29, although some firms have recently raised their targets.

feed.title: Core Alternative Capital Increases Stock Holdings in QUALCOMM Incorporated $QCOM
feed.summary: Core Alternative Capital significantly increased its stake in QUALCOMM Incorporated, adding 28,385 shares in Q3, bringing their total holdings to 28,615 shares valued at approximately $4.76 million. This increase comes amidst notable insider selling from company executives, while QUALCOMM itself exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue estimates and provided strong Q1 FY2026 guidance. Analyst ratings for QUALCOMM remain mixed, with a consensus "Hold" but varied price targets and recent upgrades/downgrades.

Analysts currently rate LYV as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus target price of $172.55.

feed.title: EFG Asset Management North America Corp. Increases Stock Position in Williams-Sonoma, Inc. $WSM

This move is part of a broader trend, as institutional investors now own 99.29% of the company, despite some insider selling. Analysts currently maintain a "Hold" rating with an average price target of $200.76 for WSM.

feed.title: Crown Castle (CCI) to Release Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) is scheduled to release its Q4 2025 earnings after market close on Wednesday, February 4th. Analysts anticipate earnings per share of $1.07 and revenue of $1.0611 billion. The company recently paid a quarterly dividend of $1.0625, representing a 4.9% yield, and currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with a target price of $106.75.

feed.title: Amazon cuts 16,000 jobs globally in broader restructuring
feed.summary: Amazon announced it is cutting 16,000 jobs worldwide, marking its second major round of layoffs in three months. The company is restructuring after pandemic-era over-hiring and focusing on expanding the adoption of artificial intelligence tools, which its CEO believes will lead to more automation and corporate job losses. These cuts contribute to a broader goal of trimming about 30,000 corporate roles across various departments.

feed.title: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) Projected to Post Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) is expected to announce its Q4 2025 earnings after market close on Wednesday, February 4th, with analysts projecting an EPS of $0.72 and revenue of $4.39 billion. The company currently holds an average "Buy" rating from analysts with a consensus price target of $111.80. Recent insider transactions show sales totaling approximately $882,335 in the last quarter, while institutional investors own about 85% of the company's shares.

feed.title: Bank of New York Mellon Corp Sells 118,267 Shares of NextEra Energy, Inc. $NEE
feed.summary: Bank of New York Mellon Corp decreased its stake in NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE) by 0.9%, selling 118,267 shares to hold 13,376,575 shares valued at over $1 billion. This comes amidst other institutional investors adjusting their positions, and significant insider selling by CEO Armando Pimentel Jr. and EVP Ronald R. Reagan. NextEra Energy reported mixed Q4 results, beating EPS estimates but missing on revenue, yet analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average target price near $92.17.

feed.title: CIBC Asset Management Inc Sells 93,491 Shares of Kenvue Inc. $KVUE
feed.summary: CIBC Asset Management Inc. reduced its stake in Kenvue Inc. (NYSE:KVUE) by 22.7%, selling 93,491 shares and holding 318,171 shares worth $5.16 million by the end of the last quarter. Concurrently, other institutional investors adjusted their positions, and Director Jeffrey C. Smith acquired 3.2 million shares, increasing his holding to over 27 million shares. Kenvue currently trades around $17.50, has a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with a target of $20.23, and reported a Q3 EPS of $0.28, beating estimates, while setting FY2025 EPS guidance at $1.00-$1.05.

Wall Street analysts currently hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for KDP with an average price target of $34.87.

feed.title: Belpointe Asset Management LLC Sells 12,734 Shares of Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO

The article also details other institutional ownership changes, analyst ratings, and recent financial performance for Cisco Systems.

feed.title: Amgen Inc. $AMGN Shares Sold by Bank of New York Mellon Corp

Insiders have also sold a significant number of shares, though institutional ownership remains high at 76.50%. Amgen recently reported a strong Q4 earnings beat and raised its quarterly dividend, with analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" rating and a consensus price target of $339.71.

feed.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. $REGN Shares Sold by Cullen Frost Bankers Inc.
feed.summary: Cullen Frost Bankers Inc. decreased its stake in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) by 91.9% in the third quarter, selling 5,904 shares. Despite this, institutional ownership remains high at 83.31%, with other major institutional investors like Dodge & Cox and Norges Bank significantly increasing their holdings. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $784.77, following strong Q3 earnings that surpassed estimates.

feed.title: GE gets back in the CVC game with healthcare venture unit
feed.summary: GE Healthcare, the medical technology arm of General Electric, is establishing a new corporate venture capital (CVC) unit five years after GE Ventures was shut down. This move marks GE's return to dedicated CVC investments, with Sabir Rassiwalla leading the new unit. The unit will focus on identifying transformative technologies and growth opportunities within the healthcare innovation ecosystem.

feed.title: A10 Networks (NYSE:ATEN) Is Doing The Right Things To Multiply Its Share Price
feed.summary: A10 Networks (NYSE:ATEN) is demonstrating strong potential for share price multiplication due to its growing return on capital employed (ROCE) and expanding capital base. The company's ROCE has increased significantly to 10% over the last five years, outperforming the Software industry average of 7.4%. This improvement, coupled with a 162% increase in capital employed and a reduced current liabilities to total assets ratio, indicates robust underlying economics and profitable reinvestment opportunities.

feed.title: Tegna Bets On Mobile Video With App Overhaul
feed.summary: Tegna has launched new mobile apps across 50 markets, emphasizing vertical video content and a shift to story-centric, 24/7 news workflows. This initiative has resulted in a 10-fold increase in video plays and a 40% rise in user sessions during testing. The company aims to meet audiences on their mobile phones with personalized local news and weather delivered by trusted journalists in a social-native format.

feed.title: Kaplan Fox Reminds BellRing Brands, Inc. (BRBR) Investors of a Securities Class Action Deadline on March 23, 2026
feed.summary: Kaplan Fox & Kilsheimer LLP is reminding investors of a securities class action lawsuit filed against BellRing Brands, Inc. (BRBR). The lawsuit alleges that BellRing made misleading statements regarding sales growth and competition during the Class Period from November 19, 2024, to August 4, 2025. Investors who purchased BellRing securities during this period and suffered losses have until March 23, 2026, to move the court to become a lead plaintiff.

feed.title: WIA - Western Asset Inflation-Linked Income Fd Latest Stock News & Market Updates
feed.summary: This page provides the latest news and market updates for Western Asset Inflation-Linked Income Fd (WIA), specifically focusing on distribution announcements and portfolio management team changes. It includes a summary of each news item by Rhea-AI, detailing impact and sentiment, alongside end-of-day stock performance. The article also provides key financial metrics like distribution rates, net investment income, and return of capital percentages for various distribution periods.

feed.title: Bio-Techne (TECH) to Release Quarterly Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: Bio-Techne (NASDAQ:TECH) is scheduled to release its Q2 2026 earnings before market open on Wednesday, February 4th. Analysts forecast earnings of $0.43 per share and revenue of $290.204 million. The company reported meeting analyst estimates with $0.42 EPS in the previous quarter, though revenue was slightly below consensus.

feed.title: Envestnet Portfolio Solutions Inc. Cuts Holdings in Sysco Corporation $SYY
feed.summary: Envestnet Portfolio Solutions Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Sysco Corporation by 57.4% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 22,548 shares and retaining 16,765 shares valued at $1.38 million. Sysco reported strong Q2 2026 earnings, beating EPS estimates and raising its full-year guidance, which led to an 11% stock rally. Despite institutional selling by some, other major firms like Vanguard and Marshall Wace LLP increased their holdings in Sysco, with 83.41% of the stock owned by institutional investors.
